SELECT DISTINCT s1.Country 
FROM singer s1 
WHERE s1.Age > 40
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM singer s2 
    WHERE s2.Country = s1.Country 
      AND s2.Age < 30
  );
